name: Better-Than-Sex Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Bake the cake in a 9 by 13-inch pan according to the instructions on the box.
2. Allow the cake to cool slightly.
3. Poke small holes in the top of the cake with a pencil.
4. Dribble sweetened condensed milk and caramel sauce over the cake.
5. Let the cake stand for an hour until it has completely cooled.
6. Frost the cake with whipped topping.
7. Sprinkle crushed candy bars over the frosting.
8. Refrigerate the cake.
